rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute As Successor In Interest For Deceased Ursula Hingorani
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs SANDEEP HINGORANI, URSULA HINGORANI and PIPER DAVIES' Motion To Substitute As Successor In Interest For Deceased Ursula Hingorani GRANTED. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICE DARK ET AL VS. PAUL THIBEAULT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT PAUL THIBEAULT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action alleged against the defendant individually and as trustee. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts in support of each cause of action as they pertain to Defendant as executor. Plaintiff's improper request for consolidation in opposition to the demurrer (without providing sufficient notice or authority) is DENIED. Plaintiff's request to sustain the demurrer without prejudice to Plaintiff seeking a leave to add causes of action to CGC-16-54-54534 Cross-Complaint against Defendant individually and as trustee, cannot be considered at this point as Plaintiff cite no authority in support of this request. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR BARRERA VS. RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to January 5, 2018 on Court's own motion. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: GIBSON CANITES VS. YEVA, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT YEVA, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Defendant demurred to each cause of action. Plaintiff filed no opposition. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: RANDOLPH R. SCOTT ET AL VS. ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to January 9, 2018. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint and reply no later than December 15, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: RANDOLPH R. SCOTT ET AL VS. ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to January 9, 2018. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint and reply no later than December 15, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: HUI WU ET AL VS. SEAN MCKEAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Docs; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 6. PLAINTIFFs HUI WU, STEVE ZHANG and SHUYI ZHANG's Motion To Compel Deft To Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Docs; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $960. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CARLA CLAY VS. MITCHELL BOYD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 5, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT MITCHELL BOYD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in paragraph 1 of Form Complaint in which capacity she is bringing this action: in her individual capacity (as is currently alleged) or in her capacity as a co-trustee of the Trust that owns the property (as argued in opposition). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/LOT)
